title: Threshold Ramp
description: Finding and holding peak sustainable power
purpose: Finding and holding peak sustainable power

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 100% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/2. 88-100% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/2. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 15:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 15:00 at 100%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 7:00. Then 25min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 7:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 100% for 15:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 100% × 15:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 100%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 100% for 15:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 100% × 15:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 82% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 82% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 47 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
